description: Learn the fundamentals of IT including hardware, software, networking, and security basics. This foundational course covers essential concepts needed for IT professionals.
Master HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to build interactive web applications. Create responsive and modern websites from scratch.
Understand relational databases, SQL queries, and data management principles. Learn to design efficient databases for business applications.
Discover security threats, protection mechanisms, and best practices. Essential knowledge for protecting systems and data.
Explore cloud services, infrastructure, and deployment models. Learn how organizations leverage cloud for scalability.
